rules.name: PHI / HIPAA / PII paths
rules.reason: Directories named PHI / HIPAA / PII are treated as protected health information and are off-limits to Cowork.

rules.name: Secrets directories
rules.reason: Directories named secrets / credentials / private-keys are treated as credential stores.

rules.name: Environment files
rules.reason: Environment files routinely contain API keys, database credentials, and other secrets.

rules.name: SSH and GPG configuration
rules.reason: SSH and GPG directories contain private keys and trusted-host lists.

rules.name: Cloud provider credential files
rules.reason: Cloud provider credential files grant production access.
